creator: yannk@apple.com
text:
I am running the command in a loop but it seems to be ok.
But doing so I looked into our old prometheus exporter and found this:

https://github.com/lovoo/ipmi_exporter/blob/master/collector/collector.go#L201

I'm wondering if the new code is more prone to errors - or surface them compared to before, but the culprit is really the exporter disabling the sensor? Thanks for your fast reply. I'll report back after updating that exporter
